title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be exploited by malicious actors to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems if misused. The tool's popularity may also lead to increased attention on dependency vulnerabilities.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and functionality before integrating it into your workflows to ensure it aligns with your security policies.
Educate teams on the responsible use of such tools to prevent unintentional exposure of sensitive information or systems.
Monitor for any updates or advisories related to the tool to stay informed about potential misuse or vulnerabilities in the tool itself.

Such manipulation leads to improper authorization. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. This product takes the approach of rol

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11521.

title: When sending a specifically crafted non-UTF-8 string as select-asn query parameter to the /api/v1...
description:
When sending a specifically crafted non-UTF-8 string as select-asn query parameter to the /api/v1/origins endpoint, Routinator crashes. 

This only affects users who allow API access from untrusted networks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Exploitation of this vulnerability can cause a denial-of-service (DoS) condition by crashing the Routinator service, potentially disrupting operations reliant on RPKI validation. This could lead to routing security issues and increased risk of BGP hijacking.
recommended_actions: Restrict API access to trusted networks only by updating firewall rules or access control lists (ACLs).
Apply the latest patch or update for Routinator as soon as it becomes available to address CVE-2026-49234.
Monitor logs for unusual or malformed API requests targeting the /api/v1/origins endpoint and block suspicious IPs.

title: Routinator exits on any error when accepting incoming HTTP or RTR connections, including ones it...
description:
Routinator exits on any error when accepting incoming HTTP or RTR connections, including ones it can recover from such as running out of file descriptors. This condition can be triggered maliciously by an attacker by opening a large number of connections to the HTTP or RTR server.

This only affects users that make their HTTP or RTR server available to untrusted networks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49232.

title: A vulnerability was identified in SourceCodester Inventory System 1.0. Affected is an unknown...
description: A vulnerability was identified in SourceCodester Inventory System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /users.php of the component User Management Page. The manipulation of the argument fullname/username leads to cross site scripting. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11518.

title: When Routinator encounters a file via RRDP using a specifically crafted Document Type Definition,...
description: When Routinator encounters a file via RRDP using a specifically crafted Document Type Definition, Routinator crashes.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Routinator allows an attacker to craft a malicious Document Type Definition (DTD) file via RRDP, causing the application to crash. This can lead to a denial of service (DoS) condition, disrupting critical operations that rely on Routinator for Resource Public Key Infrastructure (RPKI) validation.
recommended_actions: Update Routinator to the latest patched version that addresses CVE-2026-49235 as soon as it becomes available.
Implement monitoring and alerting mechanisms to detect and respond to unexpected crashes or disruptions in Routinator services.
Restrict access to RRDP endpoints to trusted sources only, and validate incoming files to reduce exposure to malicious inputs.

title: Routinator does not properly check the module component of rsync URIs, which are used to create...
description: Routinator does not properly check the module component of rsync URIs, which are used to create the file system paths for the Routinator cache. This allows for path traversal by having a module name containing .., potentially providing an attacker access to the entire Routinator rsync cache.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49233.

title: A vulnerability was found in UTT HiPER 2610G up to 3.0.0-171107. This affects the function strcpy...
description: A vulnerability was found in UTT HiPER 2610G up to 3.0.0-171107. This affects the function strcpy of the file /goform/formNatStaticMap. Performing a manipulation of the argument NatBinds results in buffer overflow. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in UTT HiPER 2610G allows for a buffer overflow via the strcpy function in the file /goform/formNatStaticMap. If exploited, this could lead to unauthorized code execution or system crashes, potentially compromising the device's integrity.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of UTT HiPER 2610G devices to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection/prevention systems to mitigate exploitation attempts.

title: Unexpected Status Code or Return Value vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http module) allows a...
description:
Unexpected Status Code or Return Value vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http module) allows a malicious HTTP server to force the client into raw protocol mode via an unsolicited 101 Switching Protocols response.

In gun_http:handle_inform/8, when a 101 Switching Protocols response is received over HTTP/1.1, the function verifies only that the Upgrade header is syntactically valid and that the stream reference is a plain reference(). It does not check whether the client ever sent an Upgrade or

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-43974.

title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http module) allows a...
description:
Uncontrolled Resource Consumption vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http module) allows a malicious server to exhaust client memory via unbounded HTTP/1.1 response buffering.

In gun_http:handle/5, three clauses accumulate incoming TCP data into the connection's buffer field using binary concatenation with no upper-bound check: the head clause appends data until the \r\n\r\n header terminator is found; the body_chunked clause appends data whenever cow_http_te:stream_chunked/2 returns a more re

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-43973.

These vulnerabilities allow attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted HTTP request.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-36789.

title: QloApps through 1.7.0 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the admin file...
description: QloApps through 1.7.0 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the admin file manager that allows authenticated administrators to inject malicious JavaScript by uploading crafted SVG files. Attackers can embed JavaScript event handlers such as onload within SVG files uploaded through the file manager to execute arbitrary scripts in the browser of any user who subsequently views the file.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated administrators to upload malicious SVG files containing embedded JavaScript. When these files are viewed, the scripts execute in the victim's browser, potentially leading to session hijacking, data exfiltration, or other malicious actions. This could compromise the integrity and confidentiality of the affected system.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using QloApps
recommended_actions: Update QloApps to a patched version as soon as a fix is released by the vendor.
Implement strict file upload validation to block SVG files or sanitize uploaded files to remove embedded scripts.
Restrict admin access to trusted users only and monitor file uploads for suspicious activity.

title: Stored cross-site scripting in the global settings change log in Checkmk <2.5.0p5, <2.4.0p31, <2...
description: Stored cross-site scripting in the global settings change log in Checkmk <2.5.0p5, <2.4.0p31, <2.3.0p48, and all 2.2.0 versions allows an administrator who can change global settings to store malicious HTML or JavaScript in changelog messages that executes in other users' browsers when they view the Activate Changes page or Audit log.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8078.

title: Origin Validation Error vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http2 module) allows cross-origin...
description:
Origin Validation Error vulnerability in ninenines gun (gun_http2 module) allows cross-origin cookie injection via unvalidated HTTP/2 PUSH_PROMISE authority.

In gun_http2:push_promise_frame/7, the :authority pseudo-header from an incoming PUSH_PROMISE frame is stored verbatim into the promised stream record without checking that it matches the connection's origin. When gun_http2:headers_frame/9 later processes the response headers for the promised stream, it calls gun_cookies:set_cookie_header/

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows cross-origin cookie injection via unvalidated HTTP/2 PUSH_PROMISE authority, potentially leading to session hijacking, unauthorized access, or data leakage. This could compromise user trust and application integrity.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest patched version of ninenines gun that addresses CVE-2026-43972.
Implement strict input validation for HTTP/2 headers, ensuring the :authority pseudo-header matches the connection's origin.
Monitor application logs for unusual or unauthorized cookie injection attempts and deploy additional security measures like Web Application Firewalls (WAFs).

title: Stored cross-site scripting in the URL dashboard widget in Checkmk <2.5.0p5, <2.4.0p31, <2.3.0p48...
description: Stored cross-site scripting in the URL dashboard widget in Checkmk <2.5.0p5, <2.4.0p31, <2.3.0p48, and all 2.2.0 versions allows a user with dashboard editing permissions to store a URL with a dangerous URI scheme such as javascript: that executes scripts in other users' browsers when they view the dashboard.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows malicious scripts to be executed in the browsers of users viewing the compromised dashboard, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or further exploitation within the affected system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Checkmk to the latest patched versions (>=2.5.0p5, >=2.4.0p31, >=2.3.0p48) to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict dashboard editing permissions to trusted users only and review existing permissions.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting XSS vulnerabilities.

title: Improper neutralization of HTML-encoded characters in the URL validation function in Checkmk <2.5...
description: Improper neutralization of HTML-encoded characters in the URL validation function in Checkmk <2.5.0p5, <2.4.0p31, <2.3.0p48, and all 2.2.0 versions allows an authenticated user to bypass URL validation and inject malicious URLs such as javascript: URIs, resulting in cross-site scripting when another user interacts with the crafted link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users to bypass URL validation and inject malicious URLs, potentially leading to cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks. This can result in unauthorized access to sensitive information, session hijacking, or further exploitation of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Checkmk to the latest patched versions: 2.5.0p5, 2.4.0p31, or 2.3.0p48.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for user-supplied data in web applications.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate any other potential vulnerabilities in the system.

title: CVE-2026-10216 - A vulnerability was detected in unitedbyai droidclaw up to 0.5.3. The affected element is an unknown
description: A vulnerability was detected in unitedbyai droidclaw up to 0.5.3. The affected element is an unknown function of the file server/src/routes/pairing.ts of the component claim Endpoint. The manipulation results in improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts. The attack may be launched remotely. This attack is characterized by high complexity. The exploitability is described as difficult. The exploit is now public and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts, which could lead to potential brute force attacks. However, the attack complexity is high, and exploitability is difficult, reducing the immediate risk. The exploit is public, increasing the likelihood of targeted attacks.
recommended_actions: Implement rate limiting and account lockout mechanisms to mitigate brute force attempts.
Update to a patched version of unitedbyai droidclaw once available or apply any temporary fixes provided by the vendor.
Monitor systems for unusual authentication activity and review logs for signs of exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-10215 - A security vulnerability has been detected in Dolibarr ERP CRM up to 23.0.1. Impacted is the functio
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Dolibarr ERP CRM up to 23.0.1. Impacted is the function checkUserAccessToObject of the file htdocs/holiday/class/api_holidays.class.php of the component Leave Request REST API. The manipulation leads to improper authorization. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. Upgrading to version 23.0.2 is recommended to address this issue. The identifier of the patch is ee93b6f2f9dd0f6aeefe9d718ab3ab0a44326b73. Upgrading the affected component is advised.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10215.

title: CVE-2026-10214 - A weakness has been identified in zhayujie chatgpt-on-wechat up to 2.0.8. This issue affects the fun
description: A weakness has been identified in zhayujie chatgpt-on-wechat up to 2.0.8. This issue affects the function _get_safety_warning of the file agent/tools/bash/bash.py of the component Bash Tool. Executing a manipulation can lead to os command injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. Upgrading to version 2.0.9 is capable of addressing this issue. This patch is called 16d9b449c9aa53ccee44144a762a2737d7ba4fc4. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in zhayujie chatgpt-on-wechat up to version 2.0.8 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands via the Bash Tool component. This could lead to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or control of the affected system, potentially compromising sensitive information or disrupting operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to version 2.0.9 of zhayujie chatgpt-on-wechat to apply the patch (16d9b449c9aa53ccee44144a762a2737d7ba4fc4).
Conduct a thorough review of systems using the vulnerable software to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access.
Implement network monitoring and intrusion detection mechanisms to identify and block potential exploitation attempts.
